channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Guacamole in Every Bite
item.description: Sampling recipes for the beloved green dip.

item.title: Energy Companies Need Permitting Certainty
item.description: The industry will struggle to grow under a politically capricious permitting system.

item.title: The Miracle of Fort Moultrie
item.description: 250 years ago, resourceful men and the palmetto tree saved the South.

item.title: The Man Who Saved the Declaration of Independence
item.description: It is time to honor State Department clerk Stephen Pleasonton.
